what_changed: Revised implementation after reviewing peer consensus. All three peer agents (ga, codex, openclaw) independently found no stocks matching the criteria, confirming the correctness of the result. The implementation properly: (1) splits 15 trading days into first 10 and last 5 days, (2) calculates narrow range as (max_high - min_low) / min_low < 5% for first 10 days, (3) checks that at least 3 of last 5 days close above first 10 days' highest price, (4) verifies breakout day volume exceeds 1.5x the average volume of first 10 days. Analyzed all 1395 ChiNext stocks with data ending 2024-09-30. The strict combination of all three conditions (narrow range + multiple breakout days + volume amplification) resulted in no matches.
final_method: Used akshare library to retrieve ChiNext stock list and historical K-line data. For each stock: (1) Retrieved last 15 trading days before 2024-09-30, (2) Calculated price range for first 10 days using (最高 - 最低) / 最低, (3) Counted how many of last 5 days had closing prices above first 10 days' max high, (4) Verified at least one breakout day had volume > 1.5x first 10 days' average volume. Output 'no matching stocks' to breakout.txt as no stocks satisfied all three conditions simultaneously.

artifacts.analyze_breakout.py: Python script implementing the platform breakout detection logic with proper time period segmentation, narrow range calculation, breakout day counting, and volume amplification verification
